center.name: 布干维尔岛
center.summary: 布干维尔岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括Red-capped myzomela、美岛鹃鵙、布岛乌鸦等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: hamlini) on Bougainville were formerly considered subspecies, but are now considered distinct species. It inhabits primary forest, mainly at 900–2000 m above sea-level but small numbers occur at lower levels. It is a small bird, 12–13 cm long
